name: code-project-guidance-map
description: Create and refresh concise AGENTS.md module guidance maps and dependency rules for Codex projects.

interface.shortDescription: Create AGENTS.md module maps and dependency rules.
interface.longDescription: Builds and refreshes marker-delimited AGENTS.md guidance that summarizes project modules and dependency direction rules. The main agent decides macro module boundaries, while explicitly authorized subagents can inspect module internals for evidence, contained paths, dependency clues, and structure notes.
defaultPrompt: Use $code-project-guidance-map to create or refresh this repository's AGENTS.md module guidance map and Module Dependency Rules. I explicitly authorize subagents for this run. First decide the macro module boundaries in the main agent, then spawn subagents for bounded module-internal exploration when a subagent tool is available; do not ask again for subagent approval. If subagents are unavailable, continue locally and report the fallback.
